content.en:
For those half-step Eternal Realms, the Void Beasts did not have any clear equivalence division, just according to the strength of the other party, compared to the realm of the Eternal Realm.

This was because they had barely come into contact with the Void Beasts, but those ancient Eternal Realms had been in contact with the Void Beasts, thus dividing the Void Beasts into tiers.

The first-order Void Beast is comparable to the Immortal Realm, the second-order Void Beast is comparable to the Immortal Realm, and the third-order Void Beast has not reached the Immortal Realm, but it is stronger than the Half-Step Immortal Realm, but it is not as powerful as the Immortal Realm, but it is difficult to entangle with the Immortal Realm.

According to the comparative analysis of the previous battles between the Immortal Realm and the Third-Order Void Beasts, a newly promoted Immortal Realm can roughly deal with six third-order Void Beasts, while the Fourth-Order Void Beasts are stronger than the newly promoted Immortal Realm, comparable to the veteran Immortal Realm Lord.

"Hurry back!"

Those Immortal Realm Lords retreated one after another, not daring to fight this third-order void beast, because they really couldn't defeat it.

The speed of the third-order void beast was very fast, and it was the first time to target the Lord of Chenhai.

Lord Chenhai also had a solemn expression, although he had severely damaged an Immortal Realm existence, but it was only by using a forbidden place and paying the price of three clones that he had severely damaged that Immortal Realm, and there was also an element of carelessness in that Immortal Realm.

And this is the home of the Void Beast, even if he is on the three clones together, he can't help this third-order Void Beast, and he will even be killed by it.

730 I saw a knife appear in the hand of Lord Chenhai, constantly slashing at the third-order void beast.

However, those attacks fell on the third-order Voidmon, and most of the attack power was canceled out by the third-order Voidmon, and the rest of the power could not bring much damage to the Voidmon.

On the contrary, the attack of the Void Beast, Lord Chenhai must deal with it with all his might, and if he is not careful, he will be injured.

And the third-order Void Beast didn't intend to let go of the other Immortal Realm Lords, countless black tentacles appeared on its body, attacking the Immortal Realm Lord, preparing to leave them all behind.

"Join forces together, or you won't be able to leave!"

The Lords of the Immortal Realm said.

Thundered!!!!!

The Immortal Realm Lords joined forces one after another to fight against the Third-Order Void Beasts.

However, their attack power could not hurt the third-order Void Beast at all, and they were completely eliminated by the Void Beast, and a gate eternal technique bombarded the third-order Void Beast, as if tickling.

Suddenly.

Some of the Immortal Realms began to cast formations in an attempt to trap this third-order void beast.

However, when the formation was arranged, with a large number of Eternal Origin weapon levels as the foundation, it still couldn't trap the third-order Void Beast.

Hiss!.

Great arrays were shattered and torn apart, and a large number of Eternal Origin weapons were shattered.

After a while, many Immortal Realm Lords were seriously injured. Xi abruptly.

Lord Chenhai's second clone appeared, but instead of letting the two clones join forces to resist the third-order void beast, he let the other clone look for opportunities on this black island.

Whenever he encounters some top-level resources, the Lord of Chenhai will take them away.

Perhaps it was the two bodies of the Chenhai Lord that put pressure on the third-order Void Beasts, causing the third-order Void Beasts to not vigorously pursue and intercept the other Immortal Realm Lords, so some Immortal Realm Lords still managed to escape.

Ye Tian also came here and had been waiting for an opportunity.

He didn't dare to delay for too long, if he continued to wait silently like this, in case the treasure he needed that could upgrade his copying talent was taken away by an immortal realm lord, it would be difficult for him to get it back.

So, he had to act as soon as possible.

But before he could act, he was going to fuse the Void Immortal Ancestral Fu into one.

He hadn't fused this Immortal Ancestor Fu called Void before, if he fused, he could use the ability of Void to offset some of the attacks, and maybe he could withstand a blow from a third-order Void Beast without dying.

Instantly, he began to merge and let the clone speed up time.

Soon.

The Void Immortal Ancestral Fu was successfully fused by Ye Tian's copy body.

Then, Ye Tian's copy body began to enter the black island.

As soon as he entered the black island, Ye Tian quickly traveled through the past following his sense of the mysterious treasure.

Perhaps there were a lot of immortal realms here on the Black Island, which caused the third-order void beast not to attack Ye Tian at the first time, thus allowing Ye Tian to really shuttle over.

The speed of the Eight Extremes Realm was so fast, and he had a clear goal, so he quickly shuttled to the location of the treasure.

"Purple Stone!"

Ye Tian saw a purple stone on a mountain peak, and without saying a word, he directly took away the purple stone, and then began to shuttle away from this black island.

At the moment when he shuttled away, a black light pierced through.

Ye Tian opened many defenses, and even the Void Immortal Ancestral Fu was also used.

Poof!

The black light pierced Ye Tian's body, and Ye Tian tried his best to hide his aura, plus his own strength was very weak, so the void beast with a low IQ felt that Ye Tian would definitely die if he suffered this blow, so he didn't make up for it at the first time.

And this gave Ye Tian the opportunity and hope to escape.

He continued to shuttle, fleeing beyond the Black Island.

And at the moment when he fled the black island, one of the fingers of the third-order void beast struck and crushed Ye Tian's body with a blow in the air.

Suddenly, Ye Tian's physical body that copied his body was annihilated, and even the will possessed by the copied body was shattered, leaving only some substance.

At this time, Ye Tian's clone did not waste time, and quickly came here, fleeing again with the things Ye Tian had left behind.

That's the benefit of having two bodies, so that you don't have a way to take things with you after you're killed.

The third-order void beast didn't notice this, so it didn't attack Ye Tian's clone at the first time, causing Ye Tian's clone to successfully escape.

In fact, if it caught up, it would naturally be able to kill Ye Tian.

However, it also had other immortal realms here and the two clones of the Chenhai Lord, so it would not abandon this place to hunt down Ye Tian.

Soon.

Ye Tian's clone escaped from the depths of the Abyss Land and came to the outer area.

He searched for an island, hid it, and began to speed up time, and when he could continue to condense the replica body, he would condense the replica body again.

Then.

Ye Tian's copy body stayed here, and the clone returned to the outside world with the purple stone, went back to the body, and handed it over to the body.

Only then can he truly rest assured. _
